checks.notes: No clear chamfered edges are visible in the isometric view. The latch body appears to have sharp rectangular edges. The pivot pin cylinder shows rounded/filleted top but no distinct chamfers on the main body edges.

issues: Chamfered edges are not clearly visible on the main latch body
The catch hook geometry is ambiguous - the right side rectangular protrusion may represent it but lacks a clear hook profile
The latch body in the front view shows a tapered/wedge profile which may partially represent the latch mechanism but is not clearly a proper catch hook
The isometric view shows a flat plate-like body with a pivot pin cylinder, but the overall shape does not strongly resemble a typical spring-loaded latch with catch hook
Spring mechanism is not visible in any view - no coil spring or spring geometry detected
The part appears to be a simplified flat body rather than a fully detailed spring-loaded latch assembly
